description_long: This sculpture depicts a majestic ibex or mountain goat standing atop a rugged, rocky base. The animal is rendered in a lifelike manner, with pronounced musculature, a detailed face, and a pair of large, spiraling horns that curve dramatically above its head. The surface of the sculpture is dark and appears to be made of metal, with a slightly glossy finish that highlights the contours and textures of the fur and rock. The stance of the ibex is dynamic, with one front leg raised as if the animal is surveying its surroundings from a high vantage point. The base is irregular and mimics natural stone, anchoring the figure solidly. The overall impression is one of strength, agility, and natural beauty, making it a striking focal point in any urban or park setting.
description: A dark, metallic sculpture of an ibex with large, spiraling horns standing on a rugged rock base. The lifelike details and dynamic pose evoke strength and natural elegance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ibex's face, chest, and both spiraling horns prominently, with the raised front leg and detailed rock base visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the body, the curvature of the horns, and the muscular structure along the torso and legs.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view emphasizing the back, hind legs, and the way the horns arch backward, with the rock base extending behind.
description_view_3: Profile view focusing on the side of the head, the full length of the horns, and the animal's poised stance atop the rock.
attribute_subject_matter: animal, specifically an ibex or mountain goat
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible; the sculpture could be placed in an outdoor urban plaza or park.
